concepts.label: Arithmetic
concepts.description: Integer and rational arithmetic, order of operations.

concepts.label: Algebraic Manipulation
concepts.description: Rearranging equations, isolating variables, distributing.

concepts.label: Exponent Rules
concepts.description: Product, quotient, and power rules for exponents.

concepts.label: Functions
concepts.description: Function notation, domain/range, composition.

concepts.label: Factoring
concepts.description: Factoring polynomials, including difference of squares.

concepts.label: Vectors
concepts.description: Vectors as ordered tuples; geometric and list views.

concepts.label: Vector Operations
concepts.description: Addition, scalar multiplication, linear combinations.

concepts.label: Dot Product
concepts.description: Inner product of two vectors; the primitive under every layer.

concepts.label: Matrices
concepts.description: Matrices as collections of vectors; shape and indexing.

concepts.label: Matrix-Vector Product
concepts.description: Applying a matrix to a vector as a stack of dot products.

concepts.label: Matrix Multiplication
concepts.description: Composing linear maps; the workhorse of a forward pass.

concepts.label: Limits
concepts.description: Limit of a function; the basis of the derivative.

concepts.label: Derivatives
concepts.description: Instantaneous rate of change; slope of the tangent.

concepts.label: Power Rule
concepts.description: Differentiating monomials a*x^n.

concepts.label: Chain Rule
concepts.description: Differentiating compositions; the heart of backprop.

concepts.label: Partial Derivatives
concepts.description: Derivatives of multivariate functions, one variable at a time.

concepts.label: Gradients
concepts.description: The vector of partial derivatives; direction of steepest ascent.

concepts.label: Probability Basics
concepts.description: Sample spaces, events, probability axioms.

concepts.label: Random Variables
concepts.description: Mapping outcomes to numbers; discrete and continuous.

concepts.label: Expectation
concepts.description: The mean of a random variable; a weighted average.

concepts.label: Variance
concepts.description: Expected squared deviation; spread of a distribution.

concepts.label: Conditional Probability
concepts.description: P(A | B); updating belief given evidence.

concepts.label: Bayes' Theorem
concepts.description: Inverting conditionals; the basis of probabilistic inference.

concepts.label: Gradient Descent
concepts.description: Iteratively stepping downhill along the negative gradient.

concepts.label: Maximum Likelihood
concepts.description: Fitting parameters by maximizing the likelihood of the data.
